feature_descriptions.step: Hour of simulation (1–744, representing one month)
feature_descriptions.amount: Transaction amount in local currency (always positive)
feature_descriptions.oldbalanceOrg: Sender account balance before the transaction
feature_descriptions.newbalanceOrig: Sender account balance after the transaction
feature_descriptions.oldbalanceDest: Receiver account balance before the transaction
feature_descriptions.newbalanceDest: Receiver account balance after the transaction
feature_descriptions.type_CASH_OUT: Binary dummy: 1 if transaction type is CASH_OUT, else 0
feature_descriptions.type_DEBIT: Binary dummy: 1 if transaction type is DEBIT, else 0
feature_descriptions.type_PAYMENT: Binary dummy: 1 if transaction type is PAYMENT, else 0
feature_descriptions.type_TRANSFER: Binary dummy: 1 if transaction type is TRANSFER, else 0

encoding_notes.encoding_strategy: pd.get_dummies with drop_first=True (CASH_IN is the dropped baseline)

spark_schema.description: Spark StructType for incoming transactions before feature engineering
